title: Predicting Scale-Up of Metal-Organic Framework Syntheses with Large Language Models
abstract: Scalable synthesis remains the gate between MOF discovery and industrial deployment, as scale-up know-how is fragmented across disparate reports. We introduce ESU-MOF, a literature-mined dataset and a positive-unlabeled learning strategy that fine-tunes large language models to predict scalability potential with 91.4% accuracy, enabling rapid data-driven triage for industrial MOF discovery.
summary: 可扩展合成仍然是 MOF 发现和工业部署之间的一道关口，因为放大技术分散在不同的报告中。我们引入了 ESU-MOF，这是一个文献挖掘数据集和一种积极的无标签学习策略，可微调大型语言模型以预测可扩展性潜力，准确率高达 91.4%，从而实现工业 MOF 发现的快速数据驱动分类。

title: Local Electroneutrality Violation as a Universal Constraint in Confined Electrolytes
abstract: We show that finite-size violations of local electroneutrality in confined electrolytes are governed by the topology of the confining domain, yielding a universal hierarchy of deviations across spherical, cylindrical, and planar geometries. Within Poisson-Boltzmann theory, we introduce an electroneutrality deviation ratio that quantifies how global electrostatic constrains associated with compacness and boundary multiplicity modify charge balance inside confined domains. Although electroneutrality is asymptotically restored in all geometries, finite-size deviations are strongest in compact spherical cavities, weaker in cylindrical confinement, and weakest in planar slits. These results identify topology as the structural origin of confinement-induced charge redistribution and stablish the violation of local electroneutrality as global constraint underlying phenomena such as overcharging anf charge reversal, demostrating that confinement-not local-not local geometric details-controls the emergence of these effects.
summary: 我们表明，受限电解质中局域电中性的有限尺寸违反是由受限域的拓扑控制的，从而产生了跨越球形、圆柱形和平面几何形状的通用偏差层次。在泊松-玻尔兹曼理论中，我们引入了电中性偏差比，该偏差比量化了与致密性和边界多重性相关的全局静电约束如何改变受限域内的电荷平衡。尽管电中性在所有几何形状中都渐近恢复，但有限尺寸偏差在致密球形空腔中最强，在圆柱形约束中较弱，在平面狭缝中最弱。这些结果将拓扑结构确定为限制引起的电荷重新分布的结构起源，并将局部电中性的违反确定为过度充电和电荷反转等现象的全局约束，证明限制（而不是局部的）控制着这些效应的出现。

title: Orientation Dynamics of Gyrotactic Microswimmers in Turbulent Flows
abstract: We study the dynamics of gyrotactic microswimmers suspended in homogeneous and isotropic turbulence by using direct numerical simulations (DNS). The swimmers are characterized by three non-dimensional parameters: their aspect ratio ($\gamma$), a dimensionless swimming speed ($\phi$), and a dimensionless reorientation time ($\psi$). Strong gyrotaxis (smaller $\psi$) promotes vertical alignment of the swimmers, while weak gyrotaxis leads to nearly isotropic orientations. At low swimming numbers, the orientation distribution is largely shape-independent with spheres and spheroids showing marginally greater vertical alignment than rods, whereas at higher activity the peaks of the distributions exhibit largely shape-independent behavior and the tails show a clear dependence on particle shape. However, at large $\psi$ rods exhibit a stronger alignment along the vertical. We observe that at small $\psi$ the rod-shaped swimmers respond to shear by aligning with the stretching direction of the strain-rate tensor, while at large $\psi$ the alignment with the vorticity vector is preferred. The orientation autocorrelation is found to decay exponentially, with a decay rate that scales as $1/(2\psi)$. Analysis of the mean-squared displacement (MSD) reveals a transition from a ballistic motion at short times to a diffusive regime at longer times. To assess the efficiency of vertical migration, we compute the probability distributions of vertical displacement over a fixed time interval and the time taken to migrate a specific vertical distance. Furthermore, we use a simplified two-dimensional model for spherical swimmers that qualitatively reproduces the key trends observed in the full three-dimensional (3D) simulations.
summary:
我们通过使用直接数值模拟（DNS）研究悬浮在均匀和各向同性湍流中的回转微型游泳器的动力学。游泳者的特征是三个无量纲参数：纵横比 ($\gamma$)、无量纲游泳速度 ($\phi$) 和无量纲重定向时间 ($\psi$)。强的回转轴（较小的$\psi$）促进游泳者的垂直对齐，而弱的回转轴导致几乎各向同性的方向。在低游动次数时，方向分布在很大程度上与形状无关，球体和椭球体显示出比杆稍大的垂直排列，而在较高活动时，分布的峰值在很大程度上表现出与形状无关的行为，并且尾部显示出对颗粒形状的明显依赖性。然而，在大的$\psi$ 杆上，沿垂直方向表现出更强的排列。我们观察到，在较小的 $\psi$ 下，杆状游泳器通过与应变率张量的拉伸方向对齐来响应剪切，而在较大的 $\psi$ 下，首选与涡量矢量对齐。

发现方向自相关呈指数衰减，衰减率为 $1/(2\psi)$。对均方位移（MSD）的分析揭示了从短时间的弹道运动到较长时间的扩散状态的转变。为了评估垂直迁移的效率，我们计算固定时间间隔内垂直位移的概率分布以及迁移特定垂直距离所需的时间。此外，我们对球形游泳者使用简化的二维模型，该模型定性地再现了在完整三维 (3D) 模拟中观察到的关键趋势。

title: Percolation Critical Probability of Aperiodic Smith Hat tile(1, $\sqrt3$)
abstract: The Smith Hat tile is the first known aperiodic monotile, having been discovered in 2023. The simple structure, constructed using only 8 kites, is unique and well motivated for analysis within percolation theory. The primary goal of this paper is to discover the critical threshold $p_c$ in both site and bond Bernoulli structures using Monte Carlo simulation for the Smith hat tile(1,$\sqrt3$). Our findings are site and bond values of $p_c^s = 0.822725 \pm 0.000044$ and $p_c^b = 0.798161 \pm 0.000044$ for edge percolation and $0.544247 \pm 0.000101$ for site percolation on the dual graph.
summary: 史密斯帽瓦片是第一个已知的非周期单瓦片，于 2023 年被发现。这种简单的结构仅使用 8 个风筝构成，是独特的，并且非常适合渗流理论中的分析。本文的主要目标是使用史密斯帽瓦片 (1,$\sqrt3$) 的蒙特卡罗模拟来发现位点和键伯努利结构中的临界阈值 $p_c$。我们的发现是对偶图上边缘渗透的位点和键值 $p_c^s = 0.822725 \pm 0.000044$ 和 $p_c^b = 0.798161 \pm 0.000044$ 以及位点渗透 $0.544247 \pm 0.000101$。

title: Linking molecular timescales to linear viscoelastic response in dilute and semidilute unentangled wormlike micelle solutions
abstract: Unentangled wormlike micelle solutions relax stress through a dynamic interplay of reversible scission and intrachain relaxation involving a hierarchy of molecular timescales whose relationship to linear viscoelastic response remains incompletely resolved. A multiparticle mesoscopic Brownian dynamics framework has been developed in which persistent worms, represented by bead-spring chains with sticky ends, assemble to form wormlike micelles via reversible scission and fusion. Both linear and ring-like micelles are formed across the dilute and semidilute concentration regimes. Accurate predictions of dynamic properties are obtained through inclusion of hydrodynamic interactions using a RPY tensor. We identify and quantify characteristic timescales governing micellar dynamics, including bond lifetimes, self- and non-self-recombination times, breakage times of wormlike micelles of length $L$, relaxation times of various contributions to stress, and the longest relaxation time. The dependence of these timescales on sticker strength, concentration, micellar topology and hydrodynamic interactions is established. The presence of ring micelles is found to moderately prolong recombination and breakage processes, while hydrodynamic interactions are shown to affect some of the timescales by reducing sticker mobility. When appropriately scaled, the dependence on mean length of the non-self-recombination and micelle breakage times collapse onto master curves. Storage and loss moduli exhibit distinctive features in the intermediate-frequency regime that are absent in homopolymer solutions. A clear connection is made between micellar timescales and these signatures in the dynamic moduli at various characteristic frequencies, providing a direct link between microscopic dynamics and macroscopic rheology in unentangled wormlike micellar solutions, in dilute and semidilute concentration regimes.
summary:
未缠结的蠕虫状胶束溶液通过可逆断裂和链内松弛的动态相互作用来松弛应力，涉及分子时间尺度的层次结构，其与线性粘弹性响应的关系仍未完全解决。开发了一种多粒子介观布朗动力学框架，其中以具有粘性末端的珠弹簧链为代表的持久蠕虫通过可逆的断裂和融合组装形成蠕虫状胶束。线性和环状胶束均在稀释和半稀释浓度范围内形成。通过使用 RPY 张量包含流体动力学相互作用，可以获得动态特性的准确预测。我们确定并量化了控制胶束动力学的特征时间尺度，包括键寿命、自重组时间和非自重组时间、长度$L$的蠕虫状胶束的断裂时间、各种对应力的贡献的弛豫时间以及最长弛豫时间。建立了这些时间尺度对贴纸强度、浓度、胶束拓扑和流体动力学相互作用的依赖性。

研究发现，环形胶束的存在可以适度延长重组和断裂过程，而流体动力学相互作用则可以通过降低贴纸的流动性来影响某些时间尺度。当适当缩放时，对非自重组平均长度和胶束断裂时间的依赖性会崩溃到主曲线上。储能模量和损耗模量在中频区域表现出均聚物溶液中不存在的独特特征。胶束时间尺度与各种特征频率下动态模量的这些特征之间建立了清晰的联系，在稀和半稀浓度状态下，在未缠结的蠕虫状胶束溶液中提供了微观动力学和宏观流变学之间的直接联系。

title: Magnetic-field control of interactions in alkaline-earth Rydberg atoms and applications to {\it XXZ} models
abstract: We study the magnetic-field dependence of the interactions between two alkaline-earth(-like) Rydberg atoms, ${}^{88}$Sr and ${}^{174}$Yb. Considering the pair of Rydberg states $|ns,{}^3S_1,m_J\rangle$ and $|(n+1)s,{}^3S_1,m_J\rangle$, we show that the effective Hamiltonian takes the form of an {\it XXZ}-type quantum spin model, as in the alkali-atom case [M. Kunimi and T. Tomita, Phys. Rev. A {\bf 112}, L051301 (2025)]. We find that the behavior of the anisotropy parameter for ${}^{174}$Yb at zero magnetic field is significantly different from that for other atomic species. This behavior originates from the strong spin-orbit coupling in ${}^{174}$Yb. We systematically calculate the interaction parameters of the {\it XXZ} model in the presence of a magnetic field and show that they can be tuned by the field. As applications to quantum many-body problems, we investigate one-dimensional systems in the large-anisotropy regime and show that the folded {\it XXZ} model can be realized in ${}^{174}$Yb systems without fine-tuning of the field. We also investigate two-dimensional square-lattice systems and show that a supersolid phase can emerge in the ground state at the mean-field level.
summary: 我们研究了两个碱土（类）里德堡原子 ${}^{88}$Sr 和 ${}^{174}$Yb 之间相互作用的磁场依赖性。考虑一对里德堡态 $|ns,{}^3S_1,m_J\rangle$ 和 $|(n+1)s,{}^3S_1,m_J\rangle$，我们证明有效哈密顿量采用 {\it XXZ} 型量子自旋模型的形式，如碱原子情况 [M. Kunimi 和 T. Tomita，物理学家。修订版 A {\bf 112}，L051301 (2025)]。我们发现零磁场下 ${}^{174}$Yb 的各向异性参数的行为与其他原子种类的行为显着不同。这种行为源于 ${}^{174}$Yb 中的强自旋轨道耦合。我们系统地计算了存在磁场时 {\it XXZ} 模型的相互作用参数，并表明它们可以通过磁场进行调整。作为量子多体问题的应用，我们研究了大各向异性区域中的一维系统，并表明折叠 {\it XXZ} 模型可以在 ${}^{174}$Yb 系统中实现，而无需对场进行微调。我们还研究了二维方晶格系统，并表明超固相可以在平均场水平的基态下出现。

title: BCS-BEC crossover of polaritonic condensates in mass-imbalanced semimetal/semiconductor microcavities
abstract: The impacts of the mass imbalance and Coulomb interaction on the complex phase structures of the polaritonic condensates and their Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer (BCS)--Bose-Einstein condensation (BEC) crossover in semiconductor and semimetal microcavities are investigated. In the framework of the unrestricted Hartree-Fock approximation, a two-band electron-hole model involving photon mode is analyzed by treating Coulomb attraction and light-matter coupling on equal footing. The single-particle spectral functions and the luminescence properties are then examined. In the semiconducting regime, a positive band gap stabilizes tightly bound excitons and yields predominantly BEC-type excitoniclike polaritonic condensates at low density, while increasing excitation density and reducing mass imbalance drives a continuous crossover toward BCS-type pairing with intermediate and photoniclike polaritonic character. In contrast, the semimetallic regime favors itinerant electron-hole pairing, with BCS-type condensates dominating and BEC excitoniclike coherence emerging only at sufficiently strong Coulomb interaction and large mass imbalance situations. The evolution of luminescence spectra provides clear spectroscopic signatures of these crossover phenomena, offering a unified framework for understanding and controlling polaritonic condensates in microcavity systems.
summary:
研究了质量不平衡和库仑相互作用对半导体和半金属微腔中极化子凝聚体及其巴丁-库珀-施里弗（BCS）-玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚（BEC）交叉的复杂相结构的影响。在无限制的Hartree-Fock近似的框架下，通过平等对待库仑引力和光-物质耦合，分析了涉及光子模式的双能带电子-空穴模型。然后检查单粒子光谱函数和发光特性。在半导体体系中，正带隙稳定了紧密束缚的激子，并在低密度下主要产生 BEC 型激子类极化子凝聚体，同时增加激发密度和减少质量不平衡，驱动了向具有中间和光子类极化子特征的 BCS 型配对的连续交叉。相比之下，半金属体系有利于巡回电子空穴配对，BCS型凝聚态占主导地位，并且只有在足够强的库仑相互作用和大质量不平衡情况下才会出现BEC类激子相干性。

发光光谱的演变提供了这些交叉现象的清晰光谱特征，为理解和控制微腔系统中的极化子凝聚态提供了统一的框架。

title: Fate of the Unbound States in Near-infinitely Deep Potential Models
abstract: Based on the one-dimensional model with quasi-periodicity and nearly infinite depth potential well, this paper studies how the depth of the potential well and non-Hermiticity affects the unbound states. By extending the Liu-Xia model to a deeper structure, we confirm through calculating IPR and based on Avila's global theory, that although the potential well is deeper, there are still unbound states within specific energy intervals. Extending the research to non-Hermitian systems with gain-loss effects, we find that the non-Hermiticity leads to the existence of unbound states in a mixed state form composed of bound states and unbounded states. However, there are clear energy boundaries between the mixed regions with unbound states and the pure bound state regions, which can be proved by Avila's global theory. Our research results provide new insights into the unbound states in extreme potential fields.
summary: 本文基于具有准周期性和近无限深度势阱的一维模型，研究了势阱深度和非厄米性对无束缚态的影响。通过将刘夏模型扩展到更深的结构，我们通过计算IPR并基于Avila的全局理论证实，虽然势阱更深，但在特定的能量区间内仍然存在无束缚态。将研究扩展到具有损益效应的非厄米系统，我们发现非厄米性导致以束缚态和无界态组成的混合状态形式存在无界态。然而，非束缚态混合区和纯束缚态区之间存在明显的能量边界，这可以由阿维拉全局理论证明。我们的研究结果为极端势场中的自由态提供了新的见解。

title: Fractals of Simple Random Walks in Two Dimensions: A Monte Carlo Study
abstract: We present a Monte Carlo study of the fractal geometry of clusters formed by discrete-time simple random walks (sRW) of $L^2$ steps on a periodic square $L\times L$ lattice. We verify with high precision that the asymptotic behavior of the cluster mass follows $M/L^2 \simeq (\ln L)^{-1} [\frac{\pi}{2}+b (\ln L)^{-2}]$, with $b\approx -(\pi/2)^{-2}$, demonstrating marginal ``logarithmic fractals". We further determine the fractal dimension of the hull to be $d_{\rm hull}=1.333\,29(14)=4/3$, in excellent agreement with the prediction of Schramm-Loewner evolution ($\rm SLE_{8/3}$) for the Brownian frontier universality class. More importantly, we analyze the chemical distance $S$ spanning the cluster and obtain strong evidence that it asymptotically scales as $S\sim L(\ln L)^{1/4}$, lying exactly on the theoretical upper bound for the chemical distance for level-set percolation clusters on the two-dimensional Gaussian free field. Our numerical results show that the sRW cluster exhibits a conformally invariant external frontier and contains highly efficient asymptotically linear connective paths.
summary: 我们提出了蒙特卡罗研究，研究由周期性方形 $L\times L$ 格子上 $L^2$ 步的离散时间简单随机游走 (sRW) 形成的簇的分形几何。我们高精度地验证了簇质量的渐近行为遵循 $M/L^2 \simeq (\ln L)^{-1} [\frac{\pi}{2}+b (\ln L)^{-2}]$，其中 $b\approx -(\pi/2)^{-2}$，展示了边缘“对数分形”。我们进一步确定船体的分形维数为 $d_{\rm hull}=1.333\,29(14)=4/3$，与布朗边界普遍性类的 Schramm-Loewner 演化 ($\rm SLE_{8/3}$) 的预测非常一致。更重要的是，我们分析了跨越簇的化学距离 $S$，并获得了强有力的证据，证明它渐近缩放为 $S\sim L(\ln L)^{1/4}$，恰好位于理论上限。二维高斯自由场上水平集渗流簇的化学距离我们的数值结果表明，sRW 簇表现出共形不变的外部边界，并包含高效的渐近线性连接路径。

title: Collective Excitations and Stability of Nonequilibrium Polariton Supersolids
abstract: Formation of nonequilibrium counterparts of supersolids, simultaneously characterized with spontaneous superfluid and crystalline order, was recently reported in incoherently pumped polariton condensates. We investigate collective excitation spectra of this phase and explicitly demonstrate the emergence of gapless Nambu-Goldstone modes due to spontaneously broken continuous phase and translation symmetries. For the recent implementation of the polariton nonequilibrium supersolidity in semiconductor metasurfaces [D. Trypogeorgos et al., Nature 639, 337 (2025)], we demonstrate the key role of attractive polariton interactions, mediated by the excitonic reservoir, for stability of the supersolid phase. Performing a thorough numerical investigation, we identify the conditions for existence of the diagonal and off-diagonal long-range order in negative-mass nonequilibrium supersolids.
summary: 最近报道了在非相干泵浦极化激元凝聚体中形成了超固体的非平衡对应物，同时具有自发超流体和晶体顺序的特征。我们研究了该相的集体激发光谱，并明确证明了由于连续相和平移对称性自发破缺而出现的无间隙南部-戈德斯通模式。最近在半导体超表面中实现了极化子非平衡超固体[D. Trypogeorgos 等人，Nature 639, 337 (2025)]，我们证明了由激子库介导的吸引极化子相互作用对于超固相稳定性的关键作用。通过进行彻底的数值研究，我们确定了负质量非平衡超固体中对角线和非对角线长程有序的存在条件。

title: Time-Uniform Error Bound for Temporal Coarse Graining in Markovian Open Quantum Systems
abstract: Several approximation procedures, such as the full or partial rotating-wave, time-averaging, and geometric-arithmetic approximations, have been proposed to derive Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL) generators from the Born-Markov quantum master equation (e.g., the Redfield equation). Establishing rigorous error bounds for these approximations is of fundamental and practical importance. However, existing bounds face two major limitations: they are highly specific to individual methods, and, more critically, they diverge in the long-time limit, ensuring the accuracy of the derived GKSL generator only in short-time regimes. In this Letter, we resolve both issues by deriving a unified, rigorous error bound for a general class of approximation methods -- termed temporal coarse graining -- that encompasses all aforementioned schemes. Crucially, our error bound is time-uniform. This guarantees that GKSL generators obtained via temporal coarse graining remain accurate for arbitrarily long times, provided the dissipation timescale is significantly longer than the bath correlation timescale.
summary: 已经提出了几种近似程序，例如全部或部分旋转波、时间平均和几何算术近似，以从玻恩-马尔可夫量子主方程（例如雷德菲尔德方程）导出 Gorini-Kossakowski-Sudarshan-Lindblad (GKSL) 生成器。为这些近似值建立严格的误差界限具有重要的基础和实际意义。然而，现有的界限面临两个主要限制：它们对于各个方法来说是高度特定的，更关键的是，它们在长期限制上存在分歧，仅确保派生的 GKSL 生成器在短时间范围内的准确性。在这封信中，我们通过为一类通用的近似方法（称为时间粗粒度）推导一个统一的、严格的误差界来解决这两个问题，该方法包含所有上述方案。至关重要的是，我们的误差范围是时间均匀的。这保证了通过时间粗粒度获得的 GKSL 生成器在任意长时间内保持准确，前提是耗散时间尺度明显长于浴相关时间尺度。

title: Decomposing Fractional Quantum Hall Wave Functions via Operator Contraction Multiplication
abstract: We develop a general algebraic scheme to decompose fractional quantum Hall (FQH) wave functions based on the operator contraction multiplication. By introducing fermionic and bosonic operators and establishing three fundamental contraction rules, we achieve an exact decomposition of Laughlin states. This approach naturally extends to multi-component systems by factorizing coupled Jastrow factors via resultants and elementary symmetric polynomials, enabling the first complete decomposition of Halperin states. For Halperin ($2,2,1$) state, we explicitly derive its basic expansion, identify root configurations, and reveal intra- and inter-color squeezing operators, thereby uncovering the underlying generalized Pauli principle. Using this method, we compute orbital entanglement spectra for up to $16$ particles with decomposition dimensions exceeding $10^{11}$, obtaining edge excitation sequences that precisely match chiral Luttinger liquid theory. Our framework breaks through the longstanding limitations of Jack polynomials, provides a unified decomposition for both single- and multi-component FQH states, and opens a new avenue for exploring wave functions for more complex FQH states.
summary: 我们开发了一种通用代数方案来基于算子收缩乘法分解分数量子霍尔（FQH）波函数。通过引入费米子和玻色子算子并建立三个基本收缩规则，我们实现了劳克林态的精确分解。这种方法自然地扩展到多组分系统，通过结果和初等对称多项式对耦合 Jastrow 因子进行因式分解，从而实现 Halperin 态的首次完整分解。对于 Halperin ($2,2,1$) 态，我们明确推导了其基本展开式，识别根配置，并揭示颜色内和颜色间压缩算子，从而揭示了底层的广义泡利原理。使用这种方法，我们计算了分解维数超过 10^{11}$ 的高达 16$ 粒子的轨道纠缠谱，获得了与手性 Luttinger 液体理论精确匹配的边缘激发序列。我们的框架突破了 Jack 多项式的长期限制，为单分量和多分量 FQH 状态提供了统一的分解，并为探索更复杂的 FQH 状态的波函数开辟了一条新途径。

title: Continuum granular flow model with restitution-derived viscoelastic damping
abstract: This work presents a unified viscoelastic-viscoplastic continuum framework for modeling rate-dependent granular flows across regimes. The formulation incorporates two distinct rate-dependent mechanisms, namely micro-inertia and viscoelastic dissipation, within a single continuum description. A central contribution is an explicit link between the coefficient of restitution and a continuum viscosity, derived from an analysis of wave attenuation in granular assemblies, thereby establishing a direct connection between particle-scale collision physics and macroscopic damping. This relation is introduced while retaining inertia-dependent plastic flow governed by the classical $\mu(I)$ rheology. The constitutive model is constructed by meticulously partitioning elastic and viscous responses within the model and corresponding stress-update routine, such that viscous dissipation governs wave propagation and collisional processes without altering the plastic flow rule. The framework is implemented within the material point method to simulate transient processes involving large deformations, material separation, and subsequent reconsolidation. A range of numerical examples, including steady, transient, vibrational, and impact-driven flows, demonstrates that the model captures wave propagation, diffusion, and rate-dependent granular behavior within a unified continuum setting.
summary:
这项工作提出了一个统一的粘弹性-粘塑性连续体框架，用于建模跨流域的速率相关颗粒流。该公式在单个连续介质描述中结合了两种不同的速率相关机制，即微惯性和粘弹性耗散。一个核心贡献是恢复系数和连续介质粘度之间的明确联系，这是通过对颗粒组件中波衰减的分析得出的，从而在颗粒尺度碰撞物理和宏观阻尼之间建立了直接联系。引入这种关系的同时保留了由经典 $\mu(I)$ 流变学控制的惯性相关塑性流动。本构模型是通过仔细划分模型内的弹性和粘性响应以及相应的应力更新例程来构建的，以便粘性耗散控制波传播和碰撞过程而不改变塑性流动规则。该框架在质点方法中实现，以模拟涉及大变形、材料分离和随后的重新固结的瞬态过程。

一系列数值示例，包括稳定流、瞬态流、振动流和冲击驱动流，表明该模型在统一的连续介质设置中捕获了波传播、扩散和速率相关的颗粒行为。

title: Data-Driven Thermal and Mechanical Modeling of Defective Covalent Organic Frameworks
abstract: Covalent Organic Frameworks (COFs) are versatile two-dimensional (2D) materials for flexible electronics, catalysis, and sensing, owing to their tunable architectures and large surface areas. However, like most materials, COFs inevitably contain synthesis-induced defects, which-similar to graphene-can strongly influence intrinsic properties, such as thermal transport and mechanical strength. To address this challenge, we have assessed the performance of a set of machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIP) capable of efficient large-scale simulations of COFs with quantum accuracy. In doing so, QCOF models (Quantum COF) were developed by tuning the state-of-the-art MACE architecture on an extensive dataset of non-equilibrium COF conformations generated from high-fidelity density functional theory calculations. The accuracy, computational efficiency, memory footprint, and transferability to unseen chemical environments of these models were benchmarked against general-purpose MACE models and their fine-tuned variants. Our results show that an invariant QCOF model with a small descriptor dimensionality and cutoff outperforms all other models in most validation tasks, including scalability to large systems, force prediction in defective COFs, and phonon dispersion calculations. The best-performing QCOF model was then used to run large-scale simulations of thermal conductivity for defective CTF-1 and COF-LZU1 systems via non-equilibrium MD, revealing a more pronounced sensitivity of CTF-1 to structural defects. Stress-strain curves were also investigated, showing that the mechanical response remains nearly invariant at low defect densities, while asymmetric behaviour emerges at large strains. This work thus provides a foundation for the design of robust quantum-informed MLIP for large-scale property simulations of defective of extended network materials.
summary:
共价有机框架 (COF) 具有可调节的结构和较大的表面积，是用于柔性电子、催化和传感的多功能二维 (2D) 材料。然而，与大多数材料一样，COF 不可避免地含有合成引起的缺陷，与石墨烯类似，它会强烈影响固有特性，例如热传输和机械强度。为了应对这一挑战，我们评估了一组机器学习原子间势 (MLIP) 的性能，这些机器学习原子间势能能够以量子精度对 COF 进行高效的大规模模拟。为此，通过在高保真密度泛函理论计算生成的非平衡 COF 构象的广泛数据集上调整最先进的 MACE 架构，开发了 QCOF 模型（量子 COF）。这些模型的准确性、计算效率、内存占用以及对不可见化学环境的可转移性以通用 MACE 模型及其微调变体为基准。

我们的结果表明，具有小描述符维数和截止值的不变 QCOF 模型在大多数验证任务中都优于所有其他模型，包括大型系统的可扩展性、有缺陷的 COF 中的力预测以及声子色散计算。然后，使用性能最佳的 QCOF 模型通过非平衡 MD 对有缺陷的 CTF-1 和 COF-LZU1 系统进行大规模热导率模拟，揭示了 CTF-1 对结构缺陷更显着的敏感性。还研究了应力-应变曲线，表明机械响应在低缺陷密度下几乎保持不变，而在大应变下出现不对称行为。因此，这项工作为设计鲁棒的量子信息 MLIP 提供了基础，用于扩展网络材料缺陷的大规模属性模拟。

title: Design optimization of flux concentrators for magnetic tunnel junctions-based sensors
abstract: Miniaturized, ultra-sensitive and easily integrable magnetometers are needed for many applications, like space exploration or health monitoring. Achieving this goal requires a magnetic sensor with high sensitivity and low noise. High sensitivity (>1000 %/mT) can be obtained by integrating high gain permalloy flux concentrators (FC). And reducing the magnetic 1/f noise can be realized by increasing the number of magnetic tunnel junctions (MTJs) in the air-gap of the FC. However, this is obtained at the expense of a wider air-gap and consequently a decrease of the magnetic gain and thus of the sensitivity. In this paper, we explore a design optimization scheme in order to find the best trade-off between high FC gain and low magnetic noise. To model the gain of the flux concentrator, we propose two complementary approaches; one is based on finite elements simulations of the FC gain where the influence of geometrical parameters of the air-gap is investigated. Then, in a second step, we propose an analytical formula consistent with all our simulations results and based on magnetic reluctance. Finally, we derive an analytical model of the sensor detectivity from which we can extract the optimal sensor design which allows an improvement by three orders of magnitude of the performances compared to a single junction.
summary:
许多应用都需要微型、超灵敏且易于集成的磁力计，例如太空探索或健康监测。实现这一目标需要具有高灵敏度和低噪声的磁传感器。通过集成高增益坡莫合金通量集中器 (FC) 可以获得高灵敏度 (>1000 %/mT)。降低磁1/f噪声可以通过增加FC气隙中磁隧道结（MTJ）的数量来实现。然而，这是以更宽的气隙为代价而获得的，并因此降低了磁增益并因此降低了灵敏度。在本文中，我们探索了一种设计优化方案，以找到高 FC 增益和低磁噪声之间的最佳平衡。为了对通量集中器的增益进行建模，我们提出了两种互补的方法；一种是基于 FC 增益的有限元模拟，其中研究了气隙几何参数的影响。然后，在第二步中，我们提出了一个与我们所有模拟结果一致并基于磁阻的分析公式。

最后，我们得出了传感器探测能力的分析模型，从中我们可以提取最佳传感器设计，与单结相比，该设计可以将性能提高三个数量级。

title: How to quantify long-time rotational motion in molecular systems
abstract: We show that all existing methods quantifying rotational motion in molecular fluids eventually fail in systems undergoing complex rotational motion characterised by slow, heterogeneous, or intermittent dynamics. This impacts in particular the study of rotational dynamics in molecular supercooled liquids near their glass transition, as well as discussions of the decoupling between rotational and translational motion and violations of the Debye-Stokes-Einstein relation. We present a brief overview of existing methods and explain why none of them can accurately capture the evolution of rotational dynamics from a diffusive fluid to an arrested solid, thus resolving inconsistent literature results. We then introduce an empirical method that efficiently solves all issues. We benchmark our method devising a family of continuous time random walk models for rotational dynamics. Our method correctly quantifies the statistics of free and caged rotational motion, as well as non-Gaussian and non-Fickian rotational dynamics, and should allow a better characterisation of dynamic heterogeneity in the rotational motion of supercooled molecular fluids.
summary: 我们表明，所有现有的量化分子流体旋转运动的方法最终都会在经历以缓慢、异质或间歇动力学为特征的复杂旋转运动的系统中失败。这尤其影响了分子过冷液体接近玻璃化转变的旋转动力学的研究，以及旋转和平移运动之间的解耦以及德拜-斯托克斯-爱因斯坦关系的违反的讨论。我们对现有方法进行了简要概述，并解释了为什么它们都不能准确捕获从扩散流体到静止固体的旋转动力学演化，从而解决了文献结果不一致的问题。然后我们引入一种有效解决所有问题的经验方法。我们对设计一系列用于旋转动力学的连续时间随机游走模型的方法进行基准测试。我们的方法正确地量化了自由和笼式旋转运动以及非高斯和非菲克旋转动力学的统计数据，并且应该能够更好地表征过冷分子流体旋转运动的动态不均匀性。

title: Symplectic symmetry of quadratic-band-touching Hamiltonians in two dimensions
abstract: The internal low-energy symmetry of the massless Lorentz-invariant Dirac Hamiltonian in $2+1$ dimensions is known to be $O(2N)$, where $N$ is the number of two-component Dirac fermions. Here we point out that there exists an analogous internal symmetry of the single-particle quadratic-band-touching Hamiltonian in two spatial dimensions, and it is the unitary symplectic group, $USp(2N)$. All fermionic bilinears belong to one of the three small irreducible representations of this group. The interacting theory that respects the $USp(2N)$ symmetry and the spatial rotations is constructed and found to allow two independent interaction terms. When these interactions are infrared-relevant the symplectic symmetry either remains preserved or becomes spontaneously broken to $USp(N) \times USp(N)$. The symmetry in the lattices such as honeycomb to infinite order in the dispersion's expansion in powers of local momentum is given by the overlap of the symplectic and the orthogonal groups. We show that this overlap is $O(2N) \bigcap USp(2N) = U(N)$.
summary: $2+1$ 维度中无质量洛伦兹不变狄拉克哈密顿量的内部低能对称性已知为 $O(2N)$，其中 $N$ 是二元狄拉克费米子的数量。这里我们指出，在二维空间中存在类似的单粒子二次能带接触哈密顿量的内对称性，它是酉辛群$USp(2N)$。所有费米子双线性都属于该组的三个小的不可约表示之一。构建了尊重 $USp(2N)$ 对称性和空间旋转的相互作用理论，并发现允许两个独立的相互作用项。当这些相互作用与红外相关时，辛对称性要么保持不变，要么自发破缺为 $USp(N) \times USp(N)$。局部动量幂色散扩展中的蜂窝状晶格的对称性是由辛群和正交群的重叠给出的。我们证明这种重叠是 $O(2N) \bigcap USp(2N) = U(N)$。

title: Pairing mechanism and superconductivity in 1313 phase La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$
abstract: Recently, the observation of superconductivity (SC) with $T_c$ $\approx$ 3.6 K in the pressurized 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ has attracted considerable interest. Here, we systematically investigate the electronic properties and superconducting mechanism of 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ using density functional theory plus dynamical mean-field theory (DFT+DMFT) and random phase approximation (RPA). Our DFT+DMFT calculations reveal that the single-layer (SL) subsystem exhibits nearly insulating behavior, with the $d_{z^2}$ orbital showing Mott physics, while the trilayer (TL) subsystem remains metallic. This indicates that SC primarily resides in the TL subsystem, whose Ni-$e_g$ orbitals are found to be hole-doped relative to bulk La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$. Based on DFT+DMFT-derived low-energy Hamiltonian, RPA-based analysis yields an $s^{\pm}$-wave pairing symmetry within the TL subsystem. Importantly, we identify two key factors that contribute to the significant suppression of $T_c$ in 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ compared to bulk La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$. First, the hole doping in the TL subsystem, as established by DMFT, leads to a decreased pairing strength, as confirmed by RPA calculations -- a trend resembling that in bulk La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$. Second, the SL subsystem acts as a bridge connecting adjacent superconducting TL subsystems, thereby forming an S-N-S Josephson junction. The resulting interlayer Josephson coupling governs the phase coherence between TL subsystems and further suppresses the global $T_c$. Combinedly, our findings suggest that the high-$T_c$ phase in the RP La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ family should be attributed to the 2222 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ rather than the 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$.
summary:
最近，在加压 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ 中观察到 $T_c$ $\approx$ 3.6 K 的超导性（SC）引起了人们的极大兴趣。在这里，我们利用密度泛函理论加上动态平均场理论（DFT+DMFT）和随机相位近似（RPA）系统地研究了1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$的电子性质和超导机制。我们的 DFT+DMFT 计算表明，单层 (SL) 子系统表现出近乎绝缘的行为，$d_{z^2}$ 轨道显示莫特物理，而三层 (TL) 子系统仍然是金属的。这表明 SC 主要存在于 TL 子系统中，其 Ni-$e_g$ 轨道被发现相对于块体 La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ 是空穴掺杂的。基于 DFT+DMFT 导出的低能哈密顿量，基于 RPA 的分析在 TL 子系统内产生 $s^{\pm}$ 波配对对称性。重要的是，与散装 La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$ 相比，我们确定了导致 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ 中 $T_c$ 显着抑制的两个关键因素。

首先，由 DMFT 确定的 TL 子系统中的空穴掺杂会导致配对强度降低，这一点已由 RPA 计算证实——这一趋势类似于散装 La$_4$Ni$_3$O$_{10}$。其次，SL子系统充当连接相邻超导TL子系统的桥梁，从而形成S-N-S约瑟夫森结。由此产生的层间约瑟夫森耦合控制 TL 子系统之间的相位相干性，并进一步抑制全局 $T_c$。综合而言，我们的研究结果表明，RP La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ 族中的高 $T_c$ 相应归因于 2222 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$，而不是 1313 La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$。

title: Dean-Kawasaki fluctuating hydrodynamics for backscattering hard rods
abstract: We study a system of backscattering hard rods in one dimension. Contrary to the usual ballistic hard rods, these hard rods flip the sign of their velocities with a rate $\gamma$. This leads to the decay of the odd moments of velocity while preserving the even moments: the number of conserved quantities in the system becomes half. The introduction of the flipping rate, $\gamma$, is a kind of integrability-breaking perturbation. One expects a change in the transport properties in the system due to the integrability breaking. We show using a Dean-Kawasaki fluctuating hydrodynamic formulation that for $t \gg 1/\gamma$, the two-time density density correlation spreads in a diffusive manner, and for $t \ll 1/\gamma$, the correlation spreads ballistically.
summary: 我们研究一维反向散射硬棒系统。与通常的弹道硬棒相反，这些硬棒以 $\gamma$ 的速率翻转其速度符号。这导致速度奇数矩衰减，同时保留偶数矩：系统中守恒量的数量减少了一半。翻转率 $\gamma$ 的引入是一种破坏可积性的扰动。由于可积性的破坏，人们预计系统中的传输特性会发生变化。我们使用 Dean-Kawasaki 脉动流体动力学公式证明，对于 $t \gg 1/\gamma$，两次密度密度相关性以扩散方式传播，而对于 $t \ll 1/\gamma$，相关性以弹道方式传播。

title: Dynamical mean-field theory for dense spin systems at finite temperature
abstract: In recent years, a method for computing spin dynamics at infinite temperature (spinDMFT) was developed. It utilizes the ideas of dynamical mean-field theory for fermions: single-site approximation and a self-consistency condition to approximate time-dependent spin correlations. In this work, we develop a crucial extension of the method to systems at finite temperature, able to compute imaginary-time correlations and thermodynamical quantities. We benchmark the method by comparison to results in finite-size systems, obtaining very good agreement with correlations in a random-coupling system, good agreement for a ferromagnetic system and large discrepancies in the case of an antiferromagnet. We note the appearance of ferromagnetic order in the method. We discuss possible extensions and potential applications of the approach.
summary: 近年来，开发了一种计算无限温度下自旋动力学的方法（spinDMFT）。它利用费米子动态平均场理论的思想：单点近似和自洽条件来近似与时间相关的自旋相关性。在这项工作中，我们将该方法扩展到有限温度下的系统，能够计算虚数时间相关性和热力学量。我们通过与有限尺寸系统中的结果进行比较来对该方法进行基准测试，在随机耦合系统中获得与相关性非常好的一致性，在铁磁系统中获得良好的一致性，在反铁磁体的情况下获得较大差异。我们注意到该方法中铁磁有序的出现。我们讨论该方法的可能扩展和潜在应用。

title: Stable Wave-Function Zeros Indicate Exciton Topology
abstract: Excitons are bound states of electrons and holes whose band topology arises from an interplay between the topology of the underlying electronic bands and the structure of the electron-hole interaction. In crystalline solids, symmetry representations and topological invariants of the conduction and valence bands constrain the structure of the exciton envelope wave function. In particular, we show that crystalline symmetry can enforce stable zeros in the exciton wave function. These occur at high-symmetry momenta, including the optically accessible total momentum p=0. We work out how the stable zeros constrain both the relative exciton-band topology (the difference of exciton and non-interacting topological invariants) and the relative band topology (the difference of valence and conduction band invariants), all without requiring detailed knowledge of the band structure or interactions. We establish these results for two-band excitons in inversion- and rotation-symmetric systems in one and two dimensions, where the relevant topological invariants are the Berry phase in one dimension and the Chern number (modulo the rotation order) in two dimensions. In two dimensions, the exciton Chern number itself can also be constrained by zero patterns.
summary:
激子是电子和空穴的束缚态，其能带拓扑由基础电子能带的拓扑和电子-空穴相互作用的结构之间的相互作用产生。在结晶固体中，导带和价带的对称表示和拓扑不变量限制了激子包络波函数的结构。特别是，我们证明晶体对称性可以在激子波函数中强制实现稳定的零点。这些发生在高对称动量下，包括光学可访问的总动量 p=0。我们计算出稳定零点如何约束相对激子带拓扑（激子和非相互作用拓扑不变量的差异）和相对能带拓扑（价带和导带不变量的差异），所有这些都不需要详细了解能带结构或相互作用。我们在一维和二维的反演对称和旋转对称系统中建立了双能带激子的结果，其中相关的拓扑不变量是一维的贝里相和二维的陈数（以旋转顺序为模）。

在二维中，激子陈数本身也可以受到零模式的约束。

title: Self-consistent evaluation of the Berry connection for Wannier functions
abstract: The Berry connection is a gauge-dependent quantity frequently used to describe the optical response of solids. Its evaluation requires a k-derivative with respect to the cell periodic-part of the Bloch-functions and is commonly calculated in the Wannier basis by using overlap matrices of cell-periodic parts of Bloch-functions at neighboring k-points. So far, all proposed interpolation schemes for the Berry connection do not account for the matrix structure of the overlap matrices explicitly but treat the matrix elements as independent, or only distinguish between diagonal and off-diagonal entries. In this work, we propose a self-consistent interpolation scheme based on the matrix logarithm resulting in a strongly improved accuracy. Furthermore, we discuss how the basis set incompleteness of the bands used in the ab-initio calculation imposes constraints on the accuracy. We quantify the basis incompleteness based on the singular values of the overlap matrices and relate it to the invariant part of the spread functional $\Omega_\mathrm{I}$ of the Wannier functions. Numerical calculations for monolayer MoS2 and bulk Si demonstrate that the proposed interpolation scheme is much less sensitive to the Wannierization details and leads to an improved quality of the velocity matrix and the optical conductivity.
summary:
贝里连接是一个与规范相关的量，经常用于描述固体的光学响应。其评估需要关于 Bloch 函数的单元周期部分的 k 导数，并且通常通过使用 Bloch 函数的单元周期部分在相邻 k 点处的重叠矩阵在 Wannier 基中计算。到目前为止，所有提出的 Berry 连接插值方案都没有明确考虑重叠矩阵的矩阵结构，而是将矩阵元素视为独立的，或者仅区分对角线和非对角线条目。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于矩阵对数的自洽插值方案，从而大大提高了精度。此外，我们讨论了从头计算中使用的带的基组不完整性如何对精度施加限制。我们根据重叠矩阵的奇异值量化基不完备性，并将其与 Wannier 函数的扩展函数 $\Omega_\mathrm{I}$ 的不变部分相关联。

单层 MoS2 和块状 Si 的数值计算表明，所提出的插值方案对 Wannierization 细节的敏感度要低得多，并且可以提高速度矩阵和光导率的质量。

title: Neural surrogates for crystal growth dynamics with variable supersaturation: explicit vs. implicit conditioning
abstract: Simulations of crystal growth are performed by using Convolutional Recurrent Neural Network surrogate models, trained on a dataset of time sequences computed by numerical integration of Allen-Cahn dynamics including faceting via kinetic anisotropy. Two network architectures are developed to take into account the effects of a variable supersaturation value. The first infers it implicitly by processing an input mini-sequence of a few evolution frames and then returns a consistent continuation of the evolution. The second takes the supersaturation parameter as an explicit input along with a single initial frame and predicts the entire sequence. The two models are systematically tested to establish strengths and weaknesses, comparing the prediction performance for models trained on datasets of different size and, in the first architecture, different lengths of input mini-sequence. The analysis of point-wise and mean absolute errors shows how the explicit parameter conditioning guarantees the best results, reproducing with high-fidelity the ground-truth profiles. Comparable results are achievable by the mini-sequence approach only when using larger training datasets. The trained models show strong conditioning by the supersaturation parameter, consistently reproducing its overall impact on growth rates as well as its local effect on the faceted morphology. Moreover, they are perfectly scalable even on 256 times larger domains and can be successfully extended to more than 10 times longer sequences with limited error accumulation. The analysis highlights the potential and limits of these approaches in view of their general exploitation for crystal growth simulations.
summary:
晶体生长的模拟是通过使用卷积循环神经网络代理模型进行的，该模型在通过艾伦-卡恩动力学数值积分计算的时间序列数据集上进行训练，包括通过动力学各向异性进行分面。开发了两种网络架构来考虑可变过饱和值的影响。第一个通过处理几个进化框架的输入迷你序列来隐式推断它，然后返回进化的一致延续。第二个将过饱和参数与单个初始帧一起作为显式输入并预测整个序列。这两个模型经过系统测试以确定优点和缺点，比较在不同大小的数据集上训练的模型的预测性能，以及在第一个架构中不同长度的输入迷你序列。对逐点误差和平均绝对误差的分析表明，显式参数调节如何保证最佳结果，以高保真度再现地面实况轮廓。仅当使用较大的训练数据集时，迷你序列方法才能实现可比较的结果。

经过训练的模型显示出过饱和参数的强烈调节作用，一致地再现了其对生长速率的整体影响以及其对多面形态的局部影响。此外，它们甚至在 256 倍大的域上也能完美扩展，并且可以成功扩展到 10 倍以上的序列，且误差累积有限。鉴于这些方法在晶体生长模拟中的普遍应用，分析强调了这些方法的潜力和局限性。

title: Novel dynamics for an inertial polar tracer in an active bath
abstract: A polar tracer immersed in an active bath is known to be propelled forward and therefore activated. Here we report that the induced dynamics of an inertial tracer can be much richer than expected. We investigate a heavy polar tracer immersed in a bath of independent active Brownian particles. Using the projection-operator formalism to integrate out the bath, we show that the tracer's reduced dynamics can be mapped to a stochastic Lorenz equation. According to the attractors in the Lorenz equation, the tracer motion is classified into several different dynamical regimes, including active Brownian motion, chiral active Brownian motion, complex chaotic motion, and zigzag active Brownian motion. For certain regimes, we derive analytical expressions for the propulsion speed, the velocity covariance, and the effective diffusion coefficient. Numerical simulations corroborate these theoretical predictions.
summary: 已知浸入活性浴中的极性示踪剂会被向前推进并因此被激活。在这里，我们报告说，惯性示踪剂的诱导动力学可能比预期丰富得多。我们研究了浸入独立活性布朗粒子浴中的重极性示踪剂。使用投影算子形式对浴进行积分，我们表明示踪剂的简化动力学可以映射到随机洛伦兹方程。根据洛伦兹方程中的吸引子，示踪运动可分为几种不同的动力学状态，包括主动布朗运动、手性主动布朗运动、复杂混沌运动和锯齿状主动布朗运动。对于某些情况，我们推导了推进速度、速度协方差和有效扩散系数的解析表达式。数值模拟证实了这些理论预测。

title: Modeling High Entropy Alloys' Mechanical Property through Natural Language-Derived Descriptors
abstract: Processing treatments of alloys, despite being influential to alloy properties, are often neglected in machine-learning aided alloy designs due to the difficulties in expressing this information. We investigated the expressiveness of transformer embeddings through synthesized annealing processing treatment text and verified that embeddings could be utilized to reconstruct the processing parameters of alloys effectively with an R2>0.99. We then utilized the vector representations of alloys' processing treatment descriptions as descriptors to model high-entropy alloys' hardness and achieved a 20% improvement in prediction, verifying that natural language-derived descriptors of processing treatment information could be utilized to improve prediction of alloy properties.
summary: 合金的加工处理尽管对合金性能有影响，但由于难以表达这些信息，在机器学习辅助合金设计中经常被忽视。我们通过综合退火处理文本研究了变压器嵌入的表现力，并验证了嵌入可以有效地重建合金的加工参数，R2>0.99。然后，我们利用合金加工处理描述的向量表示作为描述符来对高熵合金的硬度进行建模，并实现了 20% 的预测改进，验证了自然语言衍生的加工处理信息描述符可以用于改进合金性能的预测。

title: Critical role of phase-dependent properties in modeling photothermal sintering of LiCoO2 cathodes
abstract: Photothermal (photonic) sintering crystallizes as-deposited amorphous LiCoO2 (LCO) cathodes for solid-state thin-film batteries using millisecond, surface-localized heating. However, process design often relies on 1D models with phase-averaged, temperature-independent properties, which can mispredict peak temperatures and thermal damage margins. Here we develop a multiscale, data-driven framework that provides phase- and grain size-resolved thermophysical inputs for stoichiometric LCO. We train an Allegro neural network potential with near-ab initio accuracy, enabling Green-Kubo calculations of thermal conductivity for crystalline and amorphous phases. The low, weakly density-dependent conductivity of amorphous LCO motivates its use as an effective intergranular phase in a thin-interface model that reproduces observed grain-size-dependent thermal transport. Combined with measured wavelength-resolved optical properties in 1D multiphysics simulations, we show amorphous LCO absorbs more strongly and reaches higher peak temperatures than crystalline LCO; thus crystalline, constant-property models systematically overestimate safe operating windows.
summary: 光热（光子）烧结使用毫秒表面局部加热使固态薄膜电池的沉积态非晶 LiCoO2 (LCO) 阴极结晶。然而，工艺设计通常依赖于具有相位平均、与温度无关的特性的一维模型，这可能会错误地预测峰值温度和热损伤裕度。在这里，我们开发了一个多尺度、数据驱动的框架，为化学计量的 LCO 提供相和晶粒尺寸解析的热物理输入。我们以接近从头计算的精度训练 Allegro 神经网络势，从而能够对晶相和非晶相的导热系数进行 Green-Kubo 计算。非晶态 LCO 的低、弱密度依赖性电导率促使其在薄界面模型中用作有效的晶间相，重现观察到的与晶粒尺寸相关的热传输。结合一维多物理场模拟中测得的波长分辨光学特性，我们发现非晶态 LCO 比晶态 LCO 吸收更强烈，并且达到更高的峰值温度；因此，结晶的恒定特性模型系统地高估了安全操作窗口。

title: OptiMat Alloys: A FAIR End-to-End Agent with Living Database for Computational Multi-Principal Alloy Exploration
abstract: The FAIR principles have transformed how computational data and workflows are shared in materials research, yet existing repositories can only serve pre-computed entries -- broad coverage is perpetually incomplete and cannot adapt to new questions on demand. To address these challenges, we present OptiMat Alloys, a large language model-powered conversational agent for multi-principal element alloy exploration built on three pillars: a living database that stores every calculation with provenance, low-barrier accessibility through a web interface requiring zero programming expertise, and built-in uncertainty quantification via cross-potential and cross-configuration validation (see demo here this https URL ). Coupling foundational machine learning interatomic potentials covering near-all periodic table of elements with natural-language interaction, OptiMat Alloys enables targeted, on-demand computation guided by the user's domain knowledge-extending FAIR from pre-computed repositories to on-demand knowledge generation and making computational alloy screening accessible to any materials scientist.
summary: FAIR 原则改变了材料研究中计算数据和工作流程的共享方式，但现有存储库只能提供预先计算的条目——广泛的覆盖范围永远不完整，无法适应新问题的需求。为了应对这些挑战，我们推出了 OptiMat Alloys，这是一种基于大型语言模型的对话代理，用于多主要元素合金探索，其构建基于三个支柱：存储每个计算的来源的实时数据库，通过需要零编程专业知识的 Web 界面进行低门槛访问，以及通过交叉电势和交叉配置验证进行内置不确定性量化（请参阅此处的演示 https URL ）。 OptiMat Alloys 将涵盖几乎所有元素周期表的基础机器学习原子间势与自然语言交互相结合，能够在用户领域知识的指导下进行有针对性的按需计算，将 FAIR 从预先计算的存储库扩展到按需知识生成，并使任何材料科学家都可以进行计算合金筛选。

title: Extending Hamiltonian-Adaptive Resolution Simulation to Interfaces: An Updated LAMMPS Implementation and Application to Porous Solids
abstract: Many natural phenomena involve processes that happen simultaneously at different characteristic length- and timescales. Typically, the region where the process of interest happens is affected by fluctuations in its surroundings. Modeling these systems requires an effective combination of simulation resolutions. The Hamiltonian-Adaptive Resolution Simulation (H-AdResS) method allows to model dual-resolution systems in length- and time-scales compatible with molecular diffusion, by combining atomistic and particle-based coarse graining models in the same simulation box. In this work, a new implementation of H-AdResS is provided in LAMMPS 2023. New features extend the usage to more diverse interaction potentials and simplify the preparation of input files via dedicated lammps input commands, while keeping the efficiency gain of the basis method. The implementation is benchmarked by reproducing water properties from a reference atomistic simulation. Importantly, the new implementation includes changes in compensation routines allowing to simulate systems with fluctuating density. As an example, the method in its new implementation is applied to modeling a porous metal-organic framework and its gas adsorption structure and transport properties. We demonstrate that structural and dynamic properties in the atomistic region of the dual-resolution scheme are unaffected and remain those of the fully atomistic system, while increasing simulation efficiency. This paves the way for using H-AdResS to simulate complex interfaces across applications in energy storage, electrocatalysis, and membrane technologies.
summary:
许多自然现象涉及以不同特征长度和时间尺度同时发生的过程。通常，感兴趣过程发生的区域会受到周围环境波动的影响。对这些系统进行建模需要有效组合仿真分辨率。哈密​​顿自适应分辨率模拟 (H-AdResS) 方法通过在同一模拟框中结合原子和基于粒子的粗粒度模型，可以在与分子扩散兼容的长度和时间尺度上对双分辨率系统进行建模。在这项工作中，LAMMPS 2023 中提供了 H-AdResS 的新实现。新功能将使用扩展到更多样化的交互潜力，并通过专用 lammps 输入命令简化输入文件的准备，同时保持基本方法的效率增益。该实施通过从参考原子模拟再现水特性来进行基准测试。重要的是，新的实现包括补偿例程的变化，允许模拟具有波动密度的系统。

例如，该方法在其新实现中应用于模拟多孔金属有机框架及其气体吸附结构和传输特性。我们证明了双分辨率方案原子区域的结构和动态特性不受影响，并保持完全原子系统的结构和动态特性，同时提高了模拟效率。这为使用 H-AdResS 模拟能源存储、电催化和膜技术应用中的复杂界面铺平了道路。

title: Chern-Simons couplings, modular duality, and anomaly cancellation in abelian F-theory
abstract: F-theory compactifications with a nontrivial Mordell-Weil group realize abelian gauge symmetry through rational sections, but their consistency is ultimately a statement about the quantum effective action. We show that compactification on a circle makes this statement concrete: the quantized, parity-odd Chern-Simons couplings of the resulting three-dimensional theory provide a one-loop exact and scheme-independent encoding of all local four-dimensional abelian anomalies, including the mixed gauge-gravitational terms, together with their Green-Schwarz cancellation. We determine these Chern-Simons couplings in two logically independent ways, first from flux-induced terms in the M-theory dual description, and second from an explicit one-loop integration over the complete massive spectrum, including Kaluza-Klein towers and Coulomb-branch states. The agreement fixes all normalizations and clarifies how large gauge transformations reorganize the spectrum. We then show compatibility with type IIB modular duality once the known ten-dimensional duality counterterm is included, and we present a fully explicit rank-two example over projective three-space.
summary: 具有非平凡 Mordell-Weil 群的 F 理论紧化通过有理截面实现阿贝尔规范对称性，但它们的一致性最终是关于量子有效作用的陈述。我们证明，圆上的紧致化使这一陈述具体化：由此产生的三维理论的量子化、奇偶陈-西蒙斯耦合提供了对所有局部四维阿贝尔异常的单循环精确且与方案无关的编码，包括混合规范引力项及其格林-施瓦茨抵消。我们以两种逻辑上独立的方式确定这些 Chern-Simons 耦合，第一个来自 M 理论对偶描述中的通量感应项，第二个来自整个大规模谱上的显式单环积分，包括卡鲁扎-克莱因塔和库仑支链态。该协议修复了所有归一化问题，并阐明了大规格变换如何重新组织频谱。然后，一旦包含已知的十维对偶反项，我们就会展示与 IIB 型模对偶的兼容性，并且我们在射影三空间上提出一个完全明确的二阶示例。

title: SubTropica
abstract: We present SubTropica, a Mathematica package that performs symbolic integration of multi-polylogarithmic integrals using recent advances in tropical geometry. It focuses on the class of linearly-reducible Euler integrals, such as Feynman integrals, and expands them using a tropical subtraction scheme. The engine behind it is HyperIntica, a native Mathematica package for hyperlogarithm integration that can be used independently. This paper documents both packages and illustrates their usage on examples from across different physics applications. Additionally, we introduce an AI-driven library of Feynman integrals, which catalogs diagrams discussed in the literature and serves as a database for computed results. Its online version is available at: this https URL and features a graphical user interface for diagram input and retrieval of records.
summary: 我们推出了 SubTropica，这是一个 Mathematica 软件包，它利用热带几何学的最新进展来执行多重多对数积分的符号积分。它重点关注线性可约欧拉积分类，例如费曼积分，并使用热带减法方案对其进行扩展。其背后的引擎是 HyperIntica，这是一个用于超对数集成的原生 Mathematica 软件包，可以独立使用。本文记录了这两个包，并通过不同物理应用程序的示例说明了它们的用法。此外，我们还引入了人工智能驱动的费曼积分库，该库对文献中讨论的图表进行了分类，并作为计算结果的数据库。其在线版本可在以下网址获得：此 https URL，并具有用于图表输入和记录检索的图形用户界面。

title: Twisted traces and quantization of moduli stacks of 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ Chern-Simons-matter theories
abstract: We conjecture, and show in a plethora of examples, that the sphere partition function of 3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ Chern-Simons-matter theories equals a sum of twisted traces on tensor products of Verma modules over the quantization of the moduli spaces of vacua. This extends a conjecture of Gaiotto-Okazaki to Chern-Simons-matter theories. We also show that the partition function of every Abelian gauge theory with higher charges has such twisted trace decomposition, and uncover new Abelian dualities between theories with and without Chern-Simons couplings.
summary: 我们推测并通过大量例子证明，3d $\mathcal{N}=4$ Chern-Simons 物质理论的球面配分函数等于 Verma 模张量乘积在真空模空间量化上的扭曲轨迹之和。这将盖奥托-冈崎猜想延伸至陈-西蒙斯物质理论。我们还证明了每个具有更高电荷的阿贝尔规范理论的配分函数都具有这种扭曲的迹分解，并揭示了有和没有陈-西蒙斯耦合的理论之间新的阿贝尔对偶性。

title: Invariant Path-Integral Quantization and Anomaly Cancellation
abstract: We present an invariant relational path-integral quantization framework for general-relativistic gauge field theories based on the Dressing Field Method. The construction implements an automatic anomaly-cancellation mechanism that encompasses Bardeen-Wess-Zumino counterterms. The resulting framework unifies invariant schemes across contexts ranging from electroweak theory to cosmology, and is amenable to lattice implementations, key to high-precision tests in both domains.
summary: 我们提出了一种基于 Dressing 场方法的广义相对论规范场理论的不变关系路径积分量化框架。该结构实现了自动异常取消机制，其中包含 Bardeen-Wess-Zumino 反项。由此产生的框架统一了从电弱理论到宇宙学等各种背景下的不变方案，并且适合晶格实现，这是这两个领域高精度测试的关键。

title: 3D near-de Sitter gravity and the soft mode of DSSYK
abstract: We present a dual gravity interpretation of the complex reparametrization mode $\psi(u)$ that governs the soft dynamics of double-scaled SYK in the presence of a time-dependent Maldacena-Qi coupling. We find that the dual gravity system takes the form of 2+1-dimensional Einstein-de Sitter gravity with an energy distribution localized on a dS$_2$ slice within dS$_3$. The effective SYK equations of motion take the form of the Israel junction conditions across the dS$_2$ slice. We study the 1D effective action of the SYK soft mode and show that it coincides with the effective action derived from 3D Einstein-de Sitter gravity with conformal boundary conditions on $\mathscr{I}^\pm$. The boundary conditions split $\mathscr{I}^\pm$ into two hyperbolic $k=-1$ slices, and the holographic screen is placed at the intersection. We adapt the Gibbons-Hawking calculation of the Schwarzschild-de Sitter entropy to the case with $k=-1$ boundary conditions and find that it reproduces the semiclassical DSSYK entropy. The boundary-to-boundary Green functions in 3D de Sitter are equal to the square of DSSYK two-point functions. We give an alternative holographic interpretation of our results in terms of 3D AdS gravity with two time directions.
summary:
我们提出了复杂重参数化模式 $\psi(u)$ 的双引力解释，该模式在存在依赖于时间的 Maldacena-Qi 耦合的情况下控制双尺度 SYK 的软动力学。我们发现双引力系统采用 2+1 维爱因斯坦-德西特引力的形式，其能量分布位于 dS$_3$ 内的 dS$_2$ 切片上。有效的 SYK 运动方程采用 dS$_2$ 切片上的以色列结条件的形式。我们研究了 SYK 软模式的一维有效作用，并表明它与 $\mathscr{I}^\pm$ 上具有共形边界条件的 3D 爱因斯坦-德西特引力导出的有效作用一致。边界条件将$\mathscr{I}^\pm$分割成两个双曲线$k=-1$切片，全息屏幕放置在相交处。我们将 Schwarzschild-de Sitter 熵的 Gibbons-Hawking 计算应用于 $k=-1$ 边界条件的情况，并发现它再现了半经典 DSSYK 熵。 3D de Sitter 中的边界到边界格林函数等于 DSSYK 两点函数的平方。

我们根据具有两个时间方向的 3D AdS 重力给出了结果的另一种全息解释。

title: Form factors of $\mathscr{N}=4$ self-dual Yang-Mills from the chiral algebra bootstrap
abstract: The chiral algebra bootstrap (CAB) is a novel bootstrap program for form factors in quantum-integrable self-dual gauge theories, some of which in turn are helicity amplitudes in the corresponding gauge theories. The singularities that recursively generate a given (loop-level) form factor are holomorphic collinear splitting functions, equivalently celestial chiral algebra OPEs, of the self-dual theory. In this note, we apply the chiral algebra bootstrap to the simple example of self-dual 4d $\mathscr{N}=4$ super Yang-Mills (SDSYM). We use a combination of twistor space input, Koszul duality, supersymmetry, and associativity to obtain the all-loop holomorphic collinear splitting functions for SDSYM. We also use associativity to provide a simple proof of the conjecture that there are no double-poles in the loop-level OPEs for this theory. We conclude by computing several form factors, including both a reproduction of several known results and novel form factors up to two loops involving insertions of powers of the anti-self-dual field strength. These form factors compute a supersymmetric version of Higgs amplitudes in the self-dual sector. Detailed sample computations are provided to familiarize the reader with the CAB method.
summary:
手性代数引导程序（CAB）是一种新颖的引导程序，用于量子可积自对偶规范理论中的形状因子，其中一些反过来是相应规范理论中的螺旋幅度。递归生成给定（循环级）形状因子的奇点是自对偶理论的全纯共线分裂函数，相当于天体手性代数 OPE。在本文中，我们将手性代数自举法应用于自对偶 4d $\mathscr{N}=4$ super Yang-Mills (SDSYM) 的简单示例。我们使用扭量空间输入、Koszul 对偶性、超对称性和结合性的组合来获得 SDSYM 的全循环全纯共线分裂函数。我们还使用结合性来简单证明该理论的环级 OPE 中不存在双极点的猜想。我们通过计算几个形状因数得出结论，包括几个已知结果的再现和新颖的形状因数，最多两个循环，涉及插入抗自对偶场强的幂。这些形状因子计算自对偶扇区中希格斯振幅的超对称版本。

提供详细的示例计算以使读者熟悉 CAB 方法。

title: Holographic complexity of conformal fields in global de Sitter spacetime
abstract: We compute the holographic complexity of conformal quantum fields in rigid global de Sitter spacetime (dS$_{d}$) using the volume and action prescriptions. First we consider AdS$_{d+1}$ spacetime in global dS$_{d}$ foliations, and compute the complexity of the CFT supported on the global dS$_{d}$ conformal boundary. Next, we consider CFT supported on a global dS$_d$ (UV) brane embedded in AdS$_{d+1}$ spacetime, and compute the holographic complexity in this brane set up. We compare and contrast the results in the two cases, as well as with related results in the literature obtained in alternative holographic set ups involving patches of de Sitter spacetime covered by static coordinates or conformal (Poincaré) coordinates.
summary: 我们使用体积和作用规定计算刚性全局德西特时空 (dS$_{d}$) 中共形量子场的全息复杂度。首先，我们考虑全局 dS$_{d}$ 叶状结构中的 AdS$_{d+1}$ 时空，并计算全局 dS$_{d}$ 共形边界上支持的 CFT 的复杂度。接下来，我们考虑嵌入在 AdS$_{d+1}$ 时空中的全局 dS$_d$ (UV) 膜上支持的 CFT，并计算该膜设置中的全息复杂度。我们比较和对比两种情况下的结果，以及在涉及静态坐标或共形（庞加莱）坐标覆盖的德西特时空斑块的替代全息设置中获得的文献中的相关结果。

title: $O(d,d)$ symmetric gravity and finite coupling holography
abstract: We construct asymptotically AdS$_5$ black brane solutions in a theory of gravity with an infinite series of curvature corrections. The action is based on an $O(d,d)$ symmetric ansatz which has been argued to describe the classical NSNS sector of string theories. We find that, for this general class of theories, the singularity behind the horizon is not resolved by the curvature corrections. The approach to the singularity is however generically modified, being characterized by different Kasner exponents. We also show that, in the presence of a non-trivial dilaton, a slight generalization of these types of curvature corrections can generate dynamically a negative cosmological constant in the region of small coupling. This provides a mechanism through which asymptotic freedom could emerge in the hypothetical string dual of QCD.
summary: 我们在具有无限级数曲率修正的引力理论中构造渐近 AdS$_5$ 黑膜解。该动作基于 $O(d,d)$ 对称 ansatz，它被认为可以描述弦理论的经典 NSNS 部分。我们发现，对于这一类一般理论，地平线后面的奇点并不能通过曲率修正来解决。然而，奇点的方法被普遍修改，以不同的卡斯纳指数为特征。我们还表明，在存在非平凡膨胀的情况下，这些类型的曲率校正的轻微推广可以在小耦合区域动态生成负宇宙常数。这提供了一种机制，通过该机制渐近自由可以出现在 QCD 的假设弦对偶中。

title: Fermion Condensate Inflation, Dynamical Waterfall Mechanism and Primordial Black Holes
abstract: Fermion condensate inflation, where inflation emerges from four-fermion interactions induced by spacetime torsion, removes the need for additional scalar fields beyond the Standard Model. In this framework, the fermion field can be decomposed into two distinguished sectors, each giving rise to bound states. After integrating out fermions, the bound fields play the roles of the inflaton and the auxiliary fields, resembling hybrid inflation with a waterfall mechanism. The inclusion of an axial chemical potential naturally introduces a mechanism to end inflation and trigger instant preheating. During the waterfall phase, the effective potential of the fermion condensate supports the formation of non-topological solitons such as Q-balls, which act as seeds of primordial black holes. This model is intrinsically connected to Chern-Simons gravity, which implies a parity-violating universe. Consequently, both the primordial black hole (PBH) dark-matter abundance and parity-violation signatures could provide observational tests of the model.
summary: 费米子凝聚暴胀是由时空扭转引起的四费米子相互作用产生的暴涨，消除了标准模型之外额外标量场的需要。在这个框架中，费米子场可以分解为两个不同的部分，每个部分都会产生束缚态。积分出费米子后，束缚场起到暴胀子和辅助场的作用，类似于带有瀑布机制的混合暴胀。包含轴向化学势自然会引入一种结束膨胀并触发即时预热的机制。在瀑布阶段，费米子凝聚体的有效势支持非拓扑孤子的形成，例如 Q 球，它们充当原始黑洞的种子。这个模型与陈-西蒙斯引力有着内在的联系，这意味着宇宙存在着宇称破缺。因此，原初黑洞（PBH）暗物质丰度和宇称破坏特征都可以提供模型的观测测试。

title: IR behaviour of one-loop complex $\mathbb{R}\times S^3$ saddles
abstract: Gravitational path-integral over $\mathbb{R}\times S^3$ complex metrics with fluctuations is studied in 4D for Einstein-Hilbert gravity in Lorentzian signature, with the aim to investigate the IR properties of complex saddles for various boundary choices. General covariance doesn't allow arbitrary boundary choices for the background and fluctuations. In the ADM-decomposition, while imposing ``no-boundary'' condition at the initial boundary, two scenarios are considered for the final boundary: Dirichlet and fixed extrinsic curvature. Universe undergoes transition from a Euclidean to Lorentzian phase in either scenario, where the dominant saddle in Euclidean phase correspond to a Euclidean metric (imaginary time), while the Lorentzian phase has two complex metrics as dominant saddles which superimpose. One-loop corrected lapse action is computed using Hurwitz-Zeta regularization. UV-divergences canceled by suitable counter terms lead to a renormalized lapse action. One-loop renormalized Hartle-Hawking wave-function is computed using the Picard-Lefschetz and WKB methods, where the contributions coming from the metric-fluctuations show secularly growing infrared divergences as the Universe expands. This is compared with the situation in pure Lorentzian dS, corresponding to a Universe transitioning from an initial state of vanishing conjugate momenta to final state of fixed extrinsic curvature, thereby giving real saddles. Picard-Lefschetz methods alone are not sufficient to overcome the technical hurdles in the one-loop computation, which needs to be supplemented by an $i\epsilon$-prescription, achieved via slight complexification of the cosmological constant $\Lambda$. The UV renormalized one-loop dS wavefunction has the same leading IR divergence as for the Hartle-Hawking no-boundary Universe. Interestingly for all boundary choices considered, the saddles remain KSW-allowed.
summary:
在 4D 中研究了洛伦兹签名中的爱因斯坦-希尔伯特引力在 $\mathbb{R}\times S^3$ 复杂度量上的引力路径积分，旨在研究各种边界选择的复杂鞍座的红外特性。一般协方差不允许对背景和波动进行任意边界选择。在 ADM 分解中，在初始边界处施加“无边界”条件时，最终边界考虑两种情况：狄利克雷和固定外在曲率。在这两种情况下，宇宙都会经历从欧几里德相到洛伦兹相的转变，其中欧几里德相中的主导鞍对应于欧几里德度量（虚数时间），而洛伦兹相有两个复杂的度量作为叠加的主导鞍。使用 Hurwitz-Zeta 正则化计算单循环校正失误动作。通过适当的反项消除的 UV 发散会导致重新归一化的失效动作。

使用 Picard-Lefschetz 和 WKB 方法计算单环重整化 Hartle-Hawking 波函数，其中来自度量涨落的贡献显示出随着宇宙膨胀，红外发散会长期增长。这与纯洛伦兹 dS 中的情况进行比较，对应于宇宙从共轭动量消失的初始状态过渡到固定外在曲率的最终状态，从而给出真实的鞍点。单靠 Picard-Lefschetz 方法不足以克服单循环计算中的技术障碍，需要通过对宇宙常数 $\Lambda$ 进行轻微复杂化来实现 $i\epsilon$ 处方来补充。 UV 重整化单环 dS 波函数具有与 Hartle-Hawking 无边界宇宙相同的领先 IR 发散。有趣的是，对于所有考虑的边界选择，鞍座仍然是 KSW 允许的。

title: Unitary Time Evolution and Vacuum for a Quantum Stable Ghost
abstract: We quantize a classically stable system of a harmonic oscillator polynomially coupled to a ghost with negative kinetic energy. We prove that due to an integral of motion with a positive discrete spectrum: i) the Hamiltonian has a pure point spectrum unbounded in both directions, ii) the evolution is manifestly unitary, iii) the vacuum is well-defined, iv) expectation values for squares of canonical variables are bounded. Numerical solutions of the Schrödinger equation confirm these results. We argue that the discrete spectrum of the integral of motion enforces stability for extended interactions.
summary: 我们量化了与具有负动能的鬼魂耦合的谐振子多项式的经典稳定系统。我们证明，由于具有正离散谱的运动积分：i）哈密顿量具有在两个方向上无界的纯点谱，ii）演化显然是酉的，iii）真空是明确定义的，iv）规范变量平方的期望值是有界的。薛定谔方程的数值解证实了这些结果。我们认为运动积分的离散谱增强了扩展相互作用的稳定性。

title: Quantum mechanics with a ghost: Counterexamples to spectral denseness
abstract: We quantise integrable point-particle systems with opposite-sign kinetic terms and nontrivial interactions. Using methods from separability theory, we show that previously determined classical stability conditions also imply discrete separated eigenvalue spectra. The resulting energy spectrum is unbounded above and below but not necessarily dense. We establish sufficient conditions for (i) exactly one accumulation point, or (ii) none at all. This dispels the widespread notion that ghostly quantum systems must have a continuous or dense energy spectrum.
summary: 我们用相反符号的动力学项和非平凡的相互作用来量化可积的点粒子系统。使用可分离性理论的方法，我们表明先前确定的经典稳定性条件也意味着离散的分离特征值谱。所得的能谱在上方和下方是无界的，但不一定是密集的。我们为（i）恰好有一个积累点或（ii）根本没有积累点建立了充分的条件。这消除了普遍存在的观念，即幽灵量子系统必须具有连续或密集的能谱。

title: High-energy photon hologram of a photon gas
abstract: The photon hologram of a one-particle density matrix of a photon gas is derived including the case where the energy of a probe photon is above the electron-positron pair creation threshold. The explicit expressions for the holograms of a photon gas with one-particle density matrix in the form of a single Gaussian and of coherent and incoherent lattices of Gaussians are obtained. The conditions for resonant cones of coherent scattering by coherent and incoherent lattices are found. These conditions turn out to be different. The explicit expression for the dielectric susceptibility tensor of a photon gas and of a single photon prepared in arbitrary quantum states are derived on the probe photon mass-shell. It is established that a photon gas and a single photon behave in coherent photon scattering as a medium with linear and circular birefringences that is transparent below the electron-positron creation threshold and is absorbing otherwise. It is shown that, for the probe photon energies of order $1$ GeV and higher, the energies of target photons of order $1$ eV and higher, and the photon gas density such that the classical intensity parameter is of order unity, the hologram of the photon gas can be measured with existing experimental facilities.
summary:
导出光子气体的单粒子密度矩阵的光子全息图，包括探测光子的能量高于电子-正电子对产生阈值的情况。得到了具有单高斯形式的单粒子密度矩阵以及高斯相干和非相干晶格的光子气体全息图的显式表达式。找到了相干和非相干晶格相干散射的共振锥的条件。这些条件结果是不同的。光子气体和任意量子态下制备的单个光子的介电磁化率张量的显式表达式是在探针光子质量壳上导出的。已经确定，光子气体和单个光子在相干光子散射中表现为具有线性和圆形双折射的介质，该介质在电子-正电子产生阈值以下是透明的，否则会吸收。

结果表明，对于$1$ GeV量级及更高的探测光子能量、$1$ eV量级及更高的目标光子能量以及经典强度参数为单位量级的光子气体密度，可以利用现有的实验设施测量光子气体的全息图。

title: A Nearest-Neighbor Hard-Core Model on a Penrose Graph
abstract: We prove that the maximal graph-density of an independent set in a Penrose P3 tiling considered as a planar non-directed graph is equal to $(57 - 25 \sqrt{5})/2 \approx 0.54915$ despite the fact that the graph is bipartite. Accordingly, the extreme Gibbs measure of the nearest-neighbor hard core particle model on this graph is unique for sufficiently large values of the particle activity. This invalidates a natural expectation to observe the coexistence of even and odd phases.
summary: 我们证明，彭罗斯 P3 平铺中被视为平面无向图的独立集的最大图密度等于 $(57 - 25 \sqrt{5})/2 \approx 0.54915$，尽管该图是二分图。因此，该图上最近邻硬核粒子模型的极端吉布斯测度对于足够大的粒子活性值是唯一的。这使得观察偶数相位和奇数相位共存的自然期望无效。

title: How it cools? Studying the heat flow out of a semi-infinite slab in welding: An analytical approach
abstract: Additive manufacturing and welding processes are highly sensitive to heat dissipation, where improper thermal management leads to residual stresses, distortions, and cracking. Existing heat transfer models, such as Rosenthal's solutions, fail to handle finite 3D geometries, cooling effects, or transient behavior, limiting their accuracy. We overcome these limitations by developing an analytical framework that incorporates cooling boundary conditions mimicking Newton's Law of Cooling. Using two different and proven-equivalent approaches, Laplace transform and Fourier series, we derive closed-form solutions for transient and steady-state temperature profiles under various heat sources, including Gaussian, ellipsoidal, double-ellipsoidal, and time-dependent on/off switch sources. We compare our analytical solutions to numerical implementations, demonstrating strong agreement while providing deeper physical insight. This approach significantly reduces computational cost and experimental requirements, making it a scalable tool for optimizing thermal predictions and mitigating residual stresses in metal-based manufacturing. Additionally, our framework enables the generation of synthetic datasets for machine learning models to predict heat distribution efficiently.
summary: 中文摘要自动翻译失败，请展开查看英文原文。

title: On invariant solutions of linear time-fractional diffusion-wave equations with variable coefficients
abstract: We study invariant solutions of a certain class of time-fractional diffusion-wave equations with variable coefficients via Lie symmetry analysis. In physics, the fractional diffusion equation describes transport dynamics that are governed by anomalous diffusion while the fractional wave equation describes oscillations and wave propagation in various physical systems. In order to obtain exact invariant solutions of these equations, we firstly determine infinitesimal symmetries with respect to the variable coefficients of the equations. With the help of these symmetries, we then find solutions in terms of Mittag-Leffler functions, generalized Wright functions and Fox H-functions.
summary: 我们通过李对称分析研究了一类变系数时间分数扩散波方程的不变解。在物理学中，分数扩散方程描述了由反常扩散控制的输运动力学，而分数波动方程则描述了各种物理系统中的振荡和波传播。为了获得这些方程的精确不变解，我们首先确定方程的变系数的无穷小对称性。借助这些对称性，我们可以找到 Mittag-Leffler 函数、广义 Wright 函数和 Fox H 函数的解。

title: The Geometry Underlying the Quantum Harmonic Oscillator
abstract: We consider two-dimensional harmonic oscillator in the complex Bargmann-Fock-Segal representation with $T^*{\mathbb R}^{2}={\mathbb C}^2$ as classical phase space. We show that the eigenfunctions $\psi_n$ of the quantum Hamiltonian correspond to complex radial coordinates in the reduced phase space ${\mathbb C}^2/{\mathbb Z}_n\subset{\mathbb C}^2$. They describe ${\mathbb Z}_n$-invariant motion of particle along a circle $S^1$ in lens space $S^3/{\mathbb Z}_n\subset{\mathbb C}^2/{\mathbb Z}_n$, where ${\mathbb Z}_n$ is the cyclic group of rotation by an angle $2\pi/n$ on the circle $S^1$, $n=1,2,...\,$. Thus the general solution of the Schrödinger equation carries information about an infinite number of admissible classical states $\psi_n$ that can be mapped to other states after lifting into the quantum bundle. We show that in the Kepler/hydrogen atom problem there is a similar correspondence between classical and quantum states.
summary: 我们将复杂 Bargmann-Fock-Segal 表示中的二维谐振子视为经典相空间，其中 $T^*{\mathbb R}^{2}={\mathbb C}^2$ 。我们证明量子哈密顿量的特征函数 $\psi_n$ 对应于简化相空间 ${\mathbb C}^2/{\mathbb Z}_n\subset{\mathbb C}^2$ 中的复径向坐标。它们描述了粒子在透镜空间$S^3/{\mathbb Z}_n\subset{\mathbb C}^2/{\mathbb Z}_n$中沿着圆$S^1$的${\mathbb Z}_n$不变运动，其中${\mathbb Z}_n$是圆$S^1$上旋转角度$2\pi/n$的循环群， $n=1,2,...\,$。因此，薛定谔方程的通解包含有关无限数量的可接受的经典状态 $\psi_n$ 的信息，这些信息在提升到量子束后可以映射到其他状态。我们证明，在开普勒/氢原子问题中，经典态和量子态之间存在类似的对应关系。

title: Yang-Baxter Integrability and Exceptional-Point Structure in Pseudo-Hermitian Quantum Impurity Systems
abstract: We develop a mathematically controlled framework for Yang--Baxter integrability in pseudo-Hermitian quantum impurity systems arising from periodic driving of a Dirac-like bath. The effective impurity Hamiltonian possesses a dynamically generated $\PT$ symmetry and exhibits exceptional points (EPs) where it becomes non-diagonalizable. We construct a Lax operator based on a rank-one biorthogonal projector associated with the impurity contact sector and prove that it satisfies an RLL relation within a projector algebra, leading to an $\etamet$-modified RTT structure and a commuting family of transfer matrices. The associated rational projector-type $R$-matrix satisfies the Yang--Baxter equation in the $\PT$-unbroken phase and extends continuously to the EP through a regularization of the biorthogonal projector. Within this framework we derive biorthogonal Bethe equations and show that the Gaudin matrix becomes defective at the EP, motivating the diagnostic $\mathcal{R}=\kappa(G)\,|\det G|$ that sharply separates EP singularities from Kondo criticality. We further prove that Bethe rapidities exhibit square-root coalescence and $\mathbb{Z}_2$ monodromy at the EP, reflecting the underlying Jordan structure, and that the effective pseudo-Hermitian Hamiltonian emerges from the periodically driven microscopic system with controlled operator-norm error $\mathcal{O}(1/\Omega)$ via the Floquet--Magnus expansion.
summary:
我们开发了一个数学控制框架，用于由狄拉克浴的周期性驱动产生的伪厄米量子杂质系统中的杨-巴克斯特可积性。有效杂质哈密顿量具有动态生成的 $\PT$ 对称性，并表现出不可对角化的异常点 (EP)。我们基于与杂质接触扇区相关的一阶双正交投影仪构建了一个 Lax 算子，并证明它满足投影代数内的 RLL 关系，从而产生 $\etamet$ 修改的 RTT 结构和交换矩阵族。相关的有理投影型$R$-矩阵满足$\PT$-不间断阶段的Yang--Baxter方程，并通过双正交投影的正则化连续扩展到EP。在此框架内，我们推导了双正交 Bethe 方程，并表明 Gaudin 矩阵在 EP 处变得有缺陷，从而激发了诊断 $\mathcal{R}=\kappa(G)\,|\det G|$ ，从而将 EP 奇点与 Kondo 临界性区分开来。

我们进一步证明，Bethe 快度在 EP 处表现出平方根合并和 $\mathbb{Z}_2$ 单向性，反映了底层的 Jordan 结构，并且有效的伪厄米哈密顿量通过 Floquet--Magnus 展开从具有受控算子范数误差 $\mathcal{O}(1/\Omega)$ 的周期性驱动微观系统中出现。

title: Derivation of Gibbs measure from Gibbs state with the fractional Bessel interaction in Two Dimensions
abstract: We derive the classical Gibbs measure on $\mathbb{T}^2$ associated with the fractional Bessel interaction potential $\widehat{v}_\beta(k)=\langle k\rangle^{-\beta}$ from a renormalized grand-canonical quantum Bose gas with the same interaction. Our result covers the whole range $\frac32<\beta\leq2$, where $\widehat{v}_\beta(k)$ is not summable and the quantum model cannot be written in the usual density-square form, as the associated self-energy diverges. We therefore need to renormalize the zero mode by a centered number-fluctuation term and then develop a detailed analysis for the high-frequency remainders. All this allows us to implement a low-frequency localization and obtain the convergence of the quantum relative free energy to the classical fractional-Bessel free energy, as well as the convergence of the reduced density matrices to the limiting Gibbs measure.
summary: 我们从具有相同相互作用的重整化大正则量子玻色气体中推导出与分数贝塞尔相互作用势 $\widehat{v}_\beta(k)=\langle k\rangle^{-\beta}$ 相关的 $\mathbb{T}^2$ 的经典吉布斯测度。我们的结果涵盖了整个范围 $\frac32<\beta\leq2$，其中 $\widehat{v}_\beta(k)$ 不可求和，并且量子模型不能以通常的密度平方形式编写，因为相关的自能发散。因此，我们需要通过中心数波动项对零模式进行重新归一化，然后对高频余数进行详细分析。所有这些使我们能够实现低频局域化，并获得量子相对自由能向经典分数贝塞尔自由能的收敛，以及约简密度矩阵向极限吉布斯测度的收敛。

title: The KMS and GNS Spectral Gap of Quantum Markov Semigroups
abstract: We establish a relation between the exponential decay rates of quantum Markov semigroups with respect to different inner products. More precisely, it was conjectured by Fagnola, Poletti, Sasso and Umanità that for a Gaussian quantum Markov semigroup, the exponential decay rate with respect to the KMS inner product is bounded below by the exponential decay rate for the GNS inner product. We show that this is indeed the case and not limited to Gaussian quantum Markov semigroups, but holds for quantum Markov semigroups with a faithful normal invariant state on arbitrary von Neumann algebras. Additionally, the KMS inner product can be replaced by a whole class of inner products induced by operator monotone functions.
summary: 我们建立了量子马尔可夫半群的指数衰减率与不同内积之间的关系。更准确地说，Fagnola、Poletti、Sasso 和 Umanità 推测，对于高斯量子马尔可夫半群，KMS 内积的指数衰减率低于 GNS 内积的指数衰减率。我们证明情况确实如此，并且不仅限于高斯量子马尔可夫半群，而且适用于在任意冯诺依曼代数上具有忠实正常不变态的量子马尔可夫半群。此外，KMS 内积可以替换为由算子单调函数导出的一整类内积。

title: Quantum-HPC Software Stacks and the openQSE Reference Architecture: A Survey
abstract: Quantum resources are increasingly integrated into high-performance computing (HPC) and cloud environments, but quantum high-performance computing (QHPC) software stacks remain isolated, often proprietary, full-stack solutions lacking common interfaces across runtime, resource management, orchestration, and execution layers. This paper analyzes nine production QHPC stacks and identifies common design patterns and emerging requirements, covering deployment models, application interaction patterns, SDK support, and readiness for fault-tolerant operation. The survey exposes consistent needs in runtime abstraction, resource management, interconnect semantics, and observability. Based on these findings, we propose the open quantum-HPC software ecosystem ( openQSE) reference architecture as a first step toward unifying the state-of-the-practice. openQSE defines a set of layer boundaries that allow different implementations to interoperate while preserving deployment flexibility, and is structured to support both current noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) workloads and future fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC) systems without changes to upper-layer application interfaces.
summary: 量子资源越来越多地集成到高性能计算 (HPC) 和云环境中，但量子高性能计算 (QHPC) 软件堆栈仍然是孤立的，通常是专有的全堆栈解决方案，缺乏跨运行时、资源管理、编排和执行层的通用接口。本文分析了九个生产 QHPC 堆栈，并确定了常见的设计模式和新兴需求，涵盖部署模型、应用程序交互模式、SDK 支持和容错操作准备情况。该调查揭示了运行时抽象、资源管理、互连语义和可观察性方面的一致需求。基于这些发现，我们提出开放量子 HPC 软件生态系统 (openQSE) 参考架构，作为统一实践状态的第一步。 openQSE 定义了一组层边界，允许不同的实现进行互操作，同时保留部署灵活性，并且其结构可支持当前的嘈杂中级量子 (NISQ) 工作负载和未来的容错量子计算 (FTQC) 系统，而无需更改上层应用程序接口。

title: Adiabatic Error Cancellation in Berry Phase Estimation
abstract: In this work, we show that Berry phase estimation admits a natural and universal adiabatic error-cancellation mechanism, making it a promising candidate for practical quantum computing before full fault tolerance. Combining finite-runtime evolutions under $\pm H$ along the loop cancels the leading $O(T^{-1})$ phase error exactly, and Richardson extrapolation further reduces the residual error to an oscillatory term with endpoint-controlled coefficient $O(\|\dot H(0)\|^2\Delta(0)^{-4}T^{-2})$. Beyond this deterministic cancellation, we establish that, for suitable smooth runtime distributions, runtime randomization suppresses the remaining oscillatory contribution to $O(T^{-M})$ for any fixed $M$, leading to a randomized Hadamard-test algorithm for Berry phase estimation over the full range $[0,2\pi)$ with improved runtime scaling under standard sample complexity.
summary: 在这项工作中，我们证明了 Berry 相位估计承认一种自然且通用的绝热误差消除机制，使其成为完全容错之前实际量子计算的有希望的候选者。沿着循环结合 $\pm H$ 下的有限运行时演化，可以精确地消除领先的 $O(T^{-1})$ 相位误差，而 Richardson 外推法进一步将残余误差减少为具有端点控制系数 $O(\|\dot H(0)\|^2\Delta(0)^{-4}T^{-2})$ 的振荡项。除了这种确定性取消之外，我们还确定，对于合适的平滑运行时分布，运行时随机化会抑制任何固定 $M$ 对 $O(T^{-M})$ 的剩余振荡贡献，从而产生用于整个范围 $[0,2\pi)$ 上的 Berry 相位估计的随机哈达玛测试算法，并在标准样本复杂度下改进运行时缩放。

title: Ansätz Expressivity and Optimization in Variational Quantum Simulations of Transverse-field Ising Model Across System Sizes
abstract: We explore the application of the Variational Quantum Eigensolver (VQE) to investigate the ground state properties, particularly the entanglement entropy, of the Transverse Field Ising Model (TFIM) in one, two, and three dimensions, considering systems of up to 27 spins. By benchmarking VQE results against exact diagonalization and analyzing the entanglement properties across different system sizes and geometries, we assess the algorithm's effectiveness in capturing critical phenomena. Using results of TFIM, we also investigate how VQE's expressivity and optimization influence the simulation of highly entangled quantum states. We employ different ansätze: the hardware-efficient EfficientSU2 from Qiskit, the physics-inspired Hamiltonian Variational ansätz (HVA) and HVA with symmetry breaking, and benchmark their performance using energy variance, entanglement entropy, spin correlations, and magnetization. We further discuss the implications for scaling these methods to larger quantum systems.
summary: 我们探索了变分量子本征解算器 (VQE) 的应用，以研究一维、二维和三维横向场伊辛模型 (TFIM) 的基态特性，特别是纠缠熵，考虑最多 27 个自旋的系统。通过根据精确对角化对 VQE 结果进行基准测试并分析不同系统大小和几何形状的纠缠属性，我们评估了该算法在捕获关键现象方面的有效性。利用 TFIM 的结果，我们还研究了 VQE 的表现力和优化如何影响高度纠缠量子态的模拟。我们采用不同的 ansätze：来自 Qiskit 的硬件高效 EfficientSU2、受物理启发的哈密顿变分 ansätz (HVA) 和对称破缺的 HVA，并使用能量方差、纠缠熵、自旋相关性和磁化强度对其性能进行基准测试。我们进一步讨论将这些方法扩展到更大的量子系统的影响。

title: Light-induced Self-Organization in Cooperative Free Space Atomic Arrays
abstract: We investigate how laser-driven, cooperative dipole-dipole interactions in weakly trapped atomic arrays give rise to self-organized configurations. Starting from an analytically tractable two-emitter system, we identify the possible steady-state spatial arrangements accessible to the atoms. We then extend this analysis to larger ensembles in both linear and ring geometries. In linear chains, we demonstrate the emergence of topologically nontrivial dimerized configurations across a range of initial interatomic spacings. In ring geometries, we find that the system undergoes self-organized contraction and expansion, enabling access to length scales below those set by the trapping lattice. Our results demonstrate that collective light-matter interactions in free space can spontaneously generate modified ordered geometries, even when the emitters are initially separated by distances larger than their transition wavelength.
summary: 我们研究了弱俘获原子阵列中激光驱动的合作偶极子相互作用如何产生自组织结构。从分析上易于处理的双发射体系统开始，我们确定了原子可能达到的稳态空间排列。然后，我们将此分析扩展到线性和环形几何形状的更大系综。在线性链中，我们证明了在一系列初始原子间距范围内拓扑非平凡二聚构型的出现。在环形几何结构中，我们发现系统会经历自组织收缩和膨胀，从而能够达到低于捕获晶格设定的长度尺度。我们的结果表明，即使发射器最初分开的距离大于其跃迁波长，自由空间中的集体光与物质相互作用也可以自发地产生修改后的有序几何形状。

title: A rigorous quasipolynomial-time classical algorithm for SYK thermal expectations
abstract: Estimating local observables in Gibbs states is a central problem in quantum simulation. While this task is BQP-complete at asymptotically low temperatures, the possibility of quantum advantage at constant temperature remains open. The Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) model is a natural candidate: at any constant temperature, its Gibbs states have polynomial quantum circuit complexity and are not described by Gaussian states. Rigorous analyses of the SYK model are difficult due to the failure of known techniques using random matrix theory, cluster expansions, and rigorous formulations of the quantum path integral and replica trick. Despite this, we give a rigorous proof of a quasipolynomial-time classical algorithm that estimates SYK local thermal expectations at sufficiently high constant temperature.
